metadata.description: mage — a portable, self-maintaining knowledge base for software systems, with skills for durable note capture and a self-grooming memory loop.

plugins.name: mage
plugins.description: mage skills: mage:learn (capture durable notes) + the self-grooming loop mage:distill / mage:promote / mage:graduate / mage:optimize + mage:guide (how to use the knowledge base).
